topics: Examples for displacement formulation and force formulation
Equilibrium equations and strain displacement relations
Solution for bending of a cantilever beam with end load. Application of stress function to Lame's problem and stress concentration problem of a small hole in a large plate (only stress distribution)
Axisymmetric problems: thin cylinders pressurized from inside, and thick cylinders pressurized from inside and outside
Rotating disks. Unsymmetrical bending of straight beams possessing two axes of symmetry
Winkler Bach theory for bending of curved beams (with rectangular cross-section)
Solutions for elliptical cross-section, membrane analogy, torsion of thin-walled tubes, thin rectangular sections, rolled sections and multiply connected sections
